name: heartsync-app
description: Khong gian rieng tu va real-time danh cho hai nguoi.

scripts.check: node --check api/_firebase-admin.js && node --check api/couple.js && node --check api/message.js && node --check public/firebase-messaging-sw.js
scripts.test:rules: npx --yes firebase-tools@13.35.1 emulators:exec --only auth,database --project demo-heartsync "node scripts/rules-smoke.mjs"
